name: Phosphorage the Elemental Lord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フォスオラージュ
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having exactly 5 LIGHT monsters in your GY. When this card is Special Summoned: You can destroy all monsters your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Phosphorage the Elemental Lord" once per turn. If this face-up card leaves the field, skip the Battle Phase of your next turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having exactly 5 LIGHT monsters in your GY. If this face-up card leaves the field, skip the Battle Phase of your next turn.
